name: resend
description: Use Resend in Codex to send, receive, and manage email.

interface.shortDescription: Send, receive, and manage email with Resend
interface.longDescription: Use Resend in Codex to send transactional and marketing email, receive inbound email, build React Email templates, manage domains and templates, inspect delivery events, and follow deliverability best practices. Codex uses RESEND_API_KEY for live API calls.
defaultPrompt: Send a transactional email with Resend
Set up inbound email with Resend webhooks
